name: seg2-anime
prompt: [CLOTHING ANCHOR] 主角林远穿深蓝色圆领卫衣（无logo无图案）、黑色休闲裤、白色运动鞋。此服装在整个视频中不变。[LIGHTING ANCHOR] 白天上午10点，室内充满自然日光。落地窗透进暖白色阳光，整体色调明亮通透。无人工补光、无霓虹。Genshin Impact 3D anime style. Same bright co-working space. The golden holographic panel expands into a skill tree interface showing「首个任务：在30分钟内完成一份完美商业计划书。奖励：融资话术Lv2」in Chinese. Lin Yuan, dark blue sweatshirt, black pants, white sneakers, grins excitedly. His fingers fly across the MacBook keyboard. Screen shows alternating code and PPT slides. A golden progress bar rises steadily. He says in Chinese: "三十分钟？给我十分钟就够了。" Sunlight on his hands and keyboard. Normal speed, natural pacing. Chinese Mandarin.
